title: Cut Clean
description: Cut Clean for Ore and Food, work with fortune and xp
body:
Cut Clean datapack

This datapack work with modules:
  • Ancient Debris -> Make ancient debris drop netherite scraps
  • Food -> Make all mobs, kelp and potatoes drops theirs food cooked
  • Ore -> Make all ore block (deepslate included) drop ingots
  • Experience -> Require at least one of the above, it will give you xp from the cooking/smelting after you break a block

Compatible with version 1.18 and above  

Youtube video

For older version of Minecraft

If you use my pack online/in youtube please credit me
